name: unreal-engine
summary: Drive Unreal Editor through the community Unreal MCP bridge.
description: Connect Artyx to Unreal Engine for editor automation, actors, Blueprints, level composition, and verification loops.
notes: Server invocation follows chongdashu/unreal-mcp. If `uvx unreal-mcp` does not resolve to a published package, the user runs the server from a local clone per the upstream README and points command/args at it. Verify against upstream before removing `experimental`.

fields.label: Port
fields.help: Match the port the UnrealMCP editor plugin listens on.

companion.title: Finish setup inside Unreal Engine
steps: Copy the UnrealMCP plugin into your project's Plugins/ folder.
Enable it in Edit → Plugins (search 'Unreal MCP'), then restart the editor.
